name: corefire24-atticus
description: Corefire24-based C++ foundation for the ATTICUS desktop AI control plane.

gui-qt.description: Qt desktop GUI layer for the future ATTICUS operator console. Kept optional so GUI dependencies cannot block the headless core.

qt-tools.description: Qt development tools for later GUI buildout.

tests.description: Test and benchmark frameworks for ATTICUS C++ contract, unit, and performance tests.

debug-ui.description: Immediate-mode internal debug UI tools. Not part of the primary operator console.

websocket.description: WebSocket transport support for future streaming/control-plane channels.
